text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace
JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace

g.text: At the adversarial frontier of AI, robotics, and cybersecurity —

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace

g.text: I teach machines how to see, think, and deceive,

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace

g.text: then I architect the systems to defend against them.

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace

g.text: I operate where AI, cybersecurity, and robotics collide. My work

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace

g.text: is a meditation on perception — coding machines to interpret the

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace

g.text: world while questioning the authenticity of the digital reflection.

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace

g.text: Fascinated by the boundary between simulation and understanding —

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace

g.text: the moment an algorithm stops imitating intelligence and starts

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Cascadia Code, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace
